content:
We officially declare the 2018-2019 season open!

It was a full house all last weekend as 75 people played in our Season Opener Tournament in Open, A, B, C, D and women’s C categories.

Congratulations to all of our winners:

Open: Ibrahim Elserafy

A: Matt Zilinski

B: Troy Sturzenegger

C: Joe Mann

D: Ken Yaremchuk

Women’s C: Aya Okamoto

For full results, please visit: https://clublocker.com/tournaments/9770?divisionId=284&sectionId=1

Thank you to Jeff Williams for organizing the tournament and Sandra Gad for keeping everything running smoothly!
